360-full-stack.label: 360 Full Stack
360-full-stack.tagline: End-to-end execution. Strategy, creative, performance — owned entirely in-house.
360-full-stack.problemHeading: Broken systems most brands are stuck in

problemGrid.title: Vanishing Agencies
problemGrid.description: They show up with great energy and big promises. Once onboarded, they suddenly disappear. Calls get shorter, updates get vaguer and somehow nothing is on time.

problemGrid.title: Pretty But Pointless Creatives
problemGrid.description: Your feed looks stunning but your ROAS doesn't. Beautiful creatives without performance thinking is just expensive art — and empires aren't built on aesthetics alone. Brand positioning and sales have to work as one.

problemGrid.title: Junior Handoff
problemGrid.description: Founders sold you the vision but execution went to a junior three levels down. No senior eyes on your account, no accountability at the top — just a fresh face learning on your brand's dime.

problemGrid.title: Vendor Chaos
problemGrid.description: Multiple vendors, zero ownership of outcomes and the founder stuck in the middle, coordinating instead of building. When nobody owns the outcome, the outcome owns you.

servicesGrid.subtext: Custom storefronts, automation stacks, and integrations built to perform.

servicesGrid.name: Social
servicesGrid.subtext: Organic social strategy and content that builds community and drives real engagement.

servicesGrid.name: SEO
servicesGrid.subtext: Technical and content SEO that earns long-term organic visibility.

banner.headline: Clueless about growing your D2C brand?
banner.subheadline: Your brand doesn't need to grow. It needs to compound.
banner.subtext: Branding and Performance all under one roof so your business can actually compound, because that's how empires are built.

points.title: Exclusivity
points.description: We work with one brand per vertical. Not because we can't handle more, but because your competitor shouldn't share strategies and insights. We are not here to cater the masses but to build a brand that stands out.

points.title: Complete In-House Team
points.description: No freelancers, no outsourced surprises. Every person working on your account is a Clueless team member who knows your brand inside out, because they've been building it from day one.

points.title: Creative + Performance
points.description: Beautiful work that actually performs. We refuse to choose, because the brands that compound are the ones where every creative decision is also a performance decision.

points.title: Top Management Led
points.description: No junior handoffs. You get direct access to top management, always. Because the people who sold you the vision are the same ones delivering it.

caseStudies.title: The City's Biggest Flea Market Experience
caseStudies.problem: High ad spend with minimal conversions and poor audience targeting.
caseStudies.whatWeDid: Data-driven audience segmentation, creative refresh, and complete funnel optimisation.
caseStudies.result: A benchmark for community-driven brand activations through storytelling, design & digital strategy.

caseStudies.title: Crafting India's First Fan Movement Brand
caseStudies.problem: No brand presence. Struggling to generate qualified leads for enterprise ceiling fan sales.
caseStudies.whatWeDid: Complete brand overhaul, LinkedIn thought leadership, inbound content + 3D render strategy.
caseStudies.result: Turned an idea into a nationwide cultural identity — from the people, for the people.

caseStudies.title: Powering a Brand for Its IPO Phase
caseStudies.problem: Outdated digital presence, losing ground to modern solar competitors.
caseStudies.whatWeDid: Website redesign, local SEO, reputation management, investor-facing brand refresh.
caseStudies.result: Stronger identity, higher engagement & renewed market confidence ahead of IPO.
